string.name: View_results
string.value: Click the button below to view the results

string.name: parameters
string.value: This function takes four parameters: type, props, key, and children. It creates an object containing information such as element type, properties, keys, and child elements based on these parameters, and returns the object as the result

string.name: maximum_length
string.value: Specify the maximum length of an iterable algebraic group

string.name: properties
string.value: Merge the properties of multiple objects into the target object and return the merged target object.

string.name: given_object
string.value: Used to obtain the type of a given object.

string.name: values_object
string.value: Used to obtain the property values of an object.
